## Integration Type

- [ ] Agent framework integration (LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, other)
- [ ] Governance toolkit integration (Microsoft AGT, other)

- [ ] Vertical module implementation (biopharma, financial services, telecom, healthcare, other)
